orderStatuses.description: Your parcel is on the way.

terms: By placing an order, you agree that all details shared are accurate and complete.
Orders once packed can only be cancelled before dispatch confirmation.
Any misuse of promotions may result in cancellation of discounts or orders.
All product images are for reference; minor handcrafted variations may occur.
privacy: We collect only essential details required to process orders and improve service.
Payment information is processed via secure partners and never stored as plain card data.
Your personal data is never sold to third parties for advertising.
You may request data update or deletion by contacting customer support.
